text: 👉 Hi there! I am a Computer Engineer with a strong orientation towards personal and professional growth. I enjoy facing daily challenges because they allow me to learn, grow, and optimize my skills. I strive to constantly surpass myself, always seeking a better version of myself.

Currently focused on automation with low-code/no-code platforms, where I combine my full-stack developer experience (60% front, 40% back) with a practical focus on efficiency, productivity, and scalability. I also have a great affinity for the Android world and continuous process improvement.

🌎 I am the author of the book 'Haz que tu tiempo trabaje por ti', available on Amazon, where I share time management strategies applied to the tech and professional world. I love understanding user behavior: what will the customer do when they see this automated flow? Is it intuitive? Does it add value? I pay attention to details and always strive to improve the quality of what I create.

👉 Beyond work, I enjoy traveling, exploring new places, staying active, and connecting with nature. I am always willing to discover new flavors, cultures, and perspectives. In short, I consider myself a hardworking, humble, ambitious, collaborative person with a strong vocation for learning, innovation, and balance between personal and professional life.
